mapper.select:
WITH -- 1. 센터별 출고대기 (경남, 대구, 전남, 제주) PeriodOutboundWait AS ( SELECT SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD, SUM(CASE WHEN SM.DC_CD = '300' THEN SP.QTY ELSE 0 END) as gyeongnamQty, SUM(CASE WHEN SM.DC_CD = '8000' THEN SP.QTY ELSE 0 END) as gyeongbukQty, SUM(CASE WHEN SM.DC_CD = '12' THEN SP.QTY ELSE 0 END) as jeonnamQty, SUM(CASE WHEN SM.DC_CD = '6000' THEN SP.QTY ELSE 0 END) as jejuQty FROM DBO.TBL_SO_M SM WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN DBO.TBL_SO_P SP WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.TBL_SO_M_ID = SP.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DBO.TBL_MTRL_M AS PM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.PROD_CD = PM.MTRL_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = PM.AGNT_CD WHERE SM.SO_STAT_CD IN ('2000', '2500', '3000', '3500', '4000', '5000') AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SM.SO_TYPE IN ('1000', '3100', '4000', '5000', '6000', '9901', '9902', '9905', '9908') AND ISNULL(PM.MTO_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND SP.OUTBOUND_DT IS NULL AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SM.GI_LIFT_DT, 112) >= '20250816'
GROUP BY SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD ), -- 2. 용인센터 재입고대기 ReentryWaitData AS ( SELECT SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD, SUM(SP.QTY) as qty FROM DBO.TBL_SO_M SM WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN DBO.TBL_SO_P SP WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.TBL_SO_M_ID = SP.TBL_SO_M_ID WHERE SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND ISNULL(SP.RESTOCK_INBOUNDED, 'N') = 'N' AND SM.SAVE_TIME >= '20250816' AND ((SM.SO_TYPE = '9904' AND SM.SO_STAT_CD NOT IN ('0000', '1900')) OR SM.SO_STAT_CD = '8050') GROUP BY SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD ), -- 3. 가용재고 차감분 (1): 기간 내 미확정 UnconfirmedForAvailable AS ( SELECT SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD, SUM(SP.QTY) as qty FROM DBO.TBL_SO_M SM WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN DBO.TBL_SO_P SP WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.TBL_SO_M_ID = SP.TBL_SO_M_ID WHERE SM.SO_STAT_CD IN ('1000', '1200', '1900') AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SM.SAVE_TIME >= '20250816' GROUP BY SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD ), -- 4. 가용재고 차감분 (2): 미래 포함 출고대기 FutureOutboundForAvailable AS ( SELECT SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD, SUM(SP.QTY) as qty FROM DBO.TBL_SO_M SM WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN DBO.TBL_SO_P SP WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.TBL_SO_M_ID = SP.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN DBO.TBL_MTRL_M AS PM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.PROD_CD = PM.MTRL_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = PM.AGNT_CD WHERE SM.SO_STAT_CD IN ('2000', '2500', '3000', '3500', '4000') AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SM.SO_TYPE IN ('1000', '3100', '4000', '5000', '6000', '9901', '9902', '9905', '9908') AND ISNULL(PM.MTO_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND SP.OUTBOUND_DT IS NULL AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SM.DLVY_CNFM_DT, 112) >= '20250816'
GROUP BY SP.PROD_CD, SM.AGNT_CD ) SELECT MM.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, MM.AGNT_CD as agntCd, (SELECT AGNT_NM FROM TBL_AGENCY_M WHERE AGNT_CD = MM.AGNT_CD AND CMPY_CD = MM.CMPY_CD) as agntNm, MM.MTRL_CD as productCd, MM.MTRL_NM as productNm, -- 전체 재고 = 용인센터 실물 + 다른 센터 출고대기 ISNULL(MM.YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + (ISNULL(POW.gyeongnamQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.gyeongbukQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.jeonnamQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.jejuQty, 0)) as totalQty, -- 용인센터 재입고대기 ISNULL(RWD.qty, 0) as yonginReentryQty, -- 용인센터 (실물 재고만) ISNULL(MM.YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) as yonginQty, -- 센터별 출고대기 ISNULL(POW.gyeongnamQty, 0) as gyeongnamQty, ISNULL(POW.gyeongbukQty, 0) as gyeongbukQty, ISNULL(POW.jeonnamQty, 0) as jeonnamQty, ISNULL(POW.jejuQty, 0) as jejuQty, -- 가용재고 (전체재고 - 미확정 - 미래 출고대기) (ISNULL(MM.YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + (ISNULL(POW.gyeongnamQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.gyeongbukQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.jeonnamQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.jejuQty, 0))) - ISNULL(UFA.qty, 0) - ISNULL(FOFA.qty, 0) as availableQty FROM TBL_MTRL_M MM LEFT JOIN PeriodOutboundWait POW ON MM.AGNT_CD = POW.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = POW.PROD_CD LEFT JOIN ReentryWaitData RWD ON MM.AGNT_CD = RWD.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = RWD.PROD_CD LEFT JOIN UnconfirmedForAvailable UFA ON MM.AGNT_CD = UFA.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = UFA.PROD_CD LEFT JOIN FutureOutboundForAvailable FOFA ON MM.AGNT_CD = FOFA.AGNT_CD AND MM.MTRL_CD = FOFA.PROD_CD WHERE 1=1 AND MM.MTO_YN = 'N' AND ISNULL(MM.YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY, 0) + (ISNULL(POW.gyeongnamQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.gyeongbukQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.jeonnamQty, 0) + ISNULL(POW.jejuQty, 0)) > 0
AND MM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd}
AND MM.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd}
AND MM.MTRL_CD LIKE '%' + #{productCd} + '%'
AND MM.MTRL_NM LIKE '%' + #{productNm} + '%'
ORDER BY MM.MTRL_CD
mapper.update: UPDATE MM SET MM.YONGIN_CURRENT_QUANTITY = #{afterQty}, MM.CURRENT_QUANTITY = #{afterQty} + ISNULL(( SELECT SUM(SP.QTY) FROM TBL_SO_M SM WITH (NOLOCK) INNER JOIN TBL_SO_P SP WITH (NOLOCK) ON SM.TBL_SO_M_ID = SP.TBL_SO_M_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN TBL_MTRL_M AS PM WITH (NOLOCK) ON SP.PROD_CD = PM.MTRL_CD AND SM.AGNT_CD = PM.AGNT_CD WHERE SM.AGNT_CD = MM.AGNT_CD AND SP.PROD_CD = MM.MTRL_CD AND SM.DC_CD IN ('300', '8000', '12', '6000') AND SM.SO_STAT_CD IN ('2000', '2500', '3000', '3500', '4000', '5000') AND SP.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SM.SO_TYPE IN ('1000', '3100', '4000', '5000', '6000', '9901', '9902', '9905', '9908') AND ISNULL(PM.MTO_YN, 'N') = 'N' AND SP.OUTBOUND_DT IS NULL AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), SM.GI_LIFT_DT, 112) >= '20250816' ), 0), MM.UPDT_TIME = GETDATE(), MM.UPDT_USER = ISNULL(#{saveUser}, 'SYSTEM') FROM TBL_MTRL_M MM WHERE MM.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND MM.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MM.MTRL_CD = #{productCd} AND MM.MTO_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT (CMPY_CD, AGNT_CD, AGNT_NM, TBL_MTRL_M_ID, MTRL_CD, MTRL_NM, ADJUSTMENT_TYPE, BEFORE_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_QTY, AFTER_QTY, ADJUSTMENT_REASON, ADJUSTMENT_DATE, SAVE_TIME, SAVE_USER, UPDT_TIME, UPDT_USER, DELETED_YN) VALUES (#{cmpyCd}, #{agntCd}, #{agntNm}, (SELECT TBL_MTRL_M_ID FROM TBL_MTRL_M WHERE CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND MTRL_CD = #{productCd} AND MTO_YN = 'N'), #{productCd}, #{productNm}, #{adjustmentType}, #{currentQty}, #{adjustmentQty}, #{afterQty}, #{adjustmentReason}, #{adjustmentDate}, GETDATE(), #{saveUser}, GETDATE(), #{saveUser}, 'N')
mapper.select: SELECT ia.TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT_ID as tblInvAdjustmentId, ia.CMPY_CD as cmpyCd, ia.AGNT_CD as agntCd, ia.AGNT_NM as agntNm, ia.TBL_MTRL_M_ID as tblMtrlMId, ia.MTRL_CD as productCd, ia.MTRL_NM as productNm, ia.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE as adjustmentType, ia.BEFORE_QTY as beforeQty, ia.ADJUSTMENT_QTY as adjustmentQty, ia.AFTER_QTY as afterQty, ia.ADJUSTMENT_REASON as adjustmentReason, ia.ADJUSTMENT_DATE as adjustmentDate, ia.SAVE_TIME as saveTime, ia.SAVE_USER as saveUser, ia.UPDT_TIME as updtTime, ia.UPDT_USER as updtUser, ia.DELETED_YN as deletedYn FROM TBL_INV_ADJUSTMENT ia WHERE (ia.DELETED_YN IS NULL OR ia.DELETED_YN = 'N') AND ia.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND ia.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND ia.MTRL_CD = #{productCd} ORDER BY ia.ADJUSTMENT_DATE DESC, ia.SAVE_TIME DESC

SELECT Z.ZONE_NM AS zoneNm, L.LOC_NM AS locNm, S.LOT_NO AS lotNo, S.STOCK_QTY AS stockQty, (S.STOCK_QTY - S.ALLOCATED_QTY) AS availQty, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), S.EXPIRE_DATE, 120) AS expireDate, S.PLT_SPEC AS pltSpec FROM TBL_STOCK S INNER JOIN TBL_WH_ZONE_M Z ON S.ZONE_ID = Z.ZONE_ID AND S.CMPY_CD = Z.CMPY_CD INNER JOIN TBL_WH_LOC_M L ON S.LOC_ID = L.LOC_ID AND S.CMPY_CD = L.CMPY_CD WHERE S.CMPY_CD = #{cmpyCd} AND S.AGNT_CD = #{agntCd} AND S.MTRL_CD = #{productCd} AND S.STOCK_QTY > 0 AND Z.DELETED_YN = 'N' AND L.DELETED_YN = 'N' ORDER BY S.WH_CD, Z.ZONE_CD, L.LOC_CD, S.EXPIRE_DATE
